creator: jayrich@room101.sysc.com
text:
I think this may be related to the problem i reported as
i386/4563, where i get an input/output error mounting my atapi cd-rom
under 2.2-stable, under 2.2.2-release it works fine

	when you try to compile, it gives several errors about
	'structive has no member named 'ssector''

Fix: 

not known
How-To-Repeat: 
	make mount_cd9660 in /usr/src/sbin or make in /usr/src/sbin/mount_cd9660
